ksa_text: Develop and maintain operational documentation for data and AI systems, including standard operating procedures, runbooks, system security documentation, knowledge base articles, technical documentation, and process diagrams.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop system testing and validation procedures, programming, and documentation.

nice.top_element_label: Develop data standards, policies, and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-T-010 (OP, Task) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4298 is insufficient to establish relevance to analytics and business intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.430, onet=0.426, dcwf=0.424) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4298 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does OP-domain KSA OP-T-010 (composite 0.4298) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4298 for OP domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Data Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms OP domain KSA at composite 0.4298 is not a standard requirement for Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4298, domain OP, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
